# defectdojo_product_api_scan_configuration (Resource)

DefectDojo Product API Scan Configuration

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_product_api_scan_configuration" "example" {
  product            = 1
  tool_configuration = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `product` (Number) The ID of the Product.
- `tool_configuration` (Number) The ID of the Tool Configuration.

### Optional

- `service_key_1` (String) Service key 1 for the API scan configuration.
- `service_key_2` (String) Service key 2 for the API scan configuration.
- `service_key_3` (String) Service key 3 for the API scan configuration.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import defectdojo_product_api_scan_configuration.example 123
```
